title: Approve implementation of ADR-0001 test harness (Task 4 changes UI)
description: ADR-0001 is scoped (5 tasks · 11 pts) and verified unimplemented. Ready to dispatch to the delivery/engineer agent. Task 4 fixes a real correctness defect — rank drops currently render as '—' (no change) and will start rendering as '↓ N', altering dashboard output for any down-move row. No such row exists in current mock data, so visible impact today is nil, but the rendered-output change should be approved before shipping.

title: Triage ADR-0001 Test-Harness Backlog — 5 candidates · 11 pts (xprize-local-seo-agency)
description: Architecture handoff (ADR-0001) delivered 5 implementation candidates, all verified against the live tree as unimplemented. Per my constraints I will NOT start implementation without an explicit per-item triage accept. Accept fans out to implementation (focused PRs, one concern each, on autonomy=review_each_pr so every PR still waits for your merge approval). Note: Task adr1-t4 changes rendered dashboard output (rank drops will start showing '↓ N' instead of '—'); no down-move row exists in current mock data so visible impact today is nil, but it alters UI behavior. Codebase access OK, GitHub OK (0 open PRs), max_concurrent_prs defaulted to 1 (queue beyond that). Confirm autonomy_level + max_concurrent_prs if the conservative defaults are wrong.

title: Triage ADR-0001 Test-Harness Backlog — 5 candidates · 11 pts (xprize-local-seo-agency)
description: ADR-0001 emitted 5 backlog candidates, all previously verified against the live tree as unimplemented (no test script, no tsx devDep, no rank.ts, zero *.test.* files; rank-drop defect confirmed at KeywordTable.tsx:43; U+2212 minus + unguarded NaN in format.ts). Per my constraints I will NOT begin implementation without an explicit per-item triage accept. Accepted items fan out to focused PRs (one concern each). Autonomy defaulted to review_each_pr (every PR still waits for your merge) and max_concurrent_prs=1 (overflow queues). HEADS-UP on t4: it is a genuine correctness fix but changes rendered dashboard output (down-moves render '↓ N' instead of '—'); no down-move row exists in current mock data so visible impact today is nil — approve the UI change knowingly. Confirm autonomy_level + max_concurrent_prs if the conservative defaults are wrong.

title: Code Review verdict: REQUEST_CHANGES — 4 findings (rankings + format, local-seo-agency)
description: Reviewed the ADR-0001 target files against the live tree. Verdict is REQUEST_CHANGES, gated by a confirmed rank-drop correctness defect at KeywordTable.tsx:42. title: Security Scan — 2 Medium findings to triage (local-seo-agency)
description: All three scan phases ran cleanly. Two Medium findings need a fix decision; secrets and code-pattern phases were clean. Accept/reject each so resolved items aren't re-flagged on the next scan.
